disambiguated.context: During the game between the British team and the Lithuanian team, play had to be stopped because a brawl had broke out within one set of fans. 8 fans were arrested for unruly behaviour, apparently some words were exchanged which got heated very quickly. The fans in question were all actually British and picked a fight between themselves in the heat of the moment.
disambiguated.question: Which set of fans caused the ruckus?
